raw.subject: Triplet Dad takes trend to Next Level! in Hobbs
raw.body:
Hi,

Your Hobbs page caught my eye, especially with the funny pumpkin video of Triplet Dad taking grooming to the next level! It's clear you have a lot of fun with your family and that energy shines through.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential clients confused about your hours or services. As a pet grooming business, having a dedicated site can help you show off your expertise and make it easier for people in Hobbs to find you.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea using your Facebook photos and posts. It includes a brief introduction to your services and a photo gallery showcasing your happy clients – I included a few of your favorite 'before and after' shots. There's also a clear call-to-action to book grooming, making it easy for customers to get in touch.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/griffin-grooming-hobbs

If you're interested in taking your online presence to the next level, I'd be happy to discuss the details with you. A straightforward project like this often comes with a flat fee for local businesses, and I'd love to chat more about how I can help. Just reply to get started or let's schedule a quick call to explore further.
